cloud-services.body:
Cloud & Infrastructure Services

HPE-powered private cloud and managed public cloud—implemented and operated by IT LEGENDS.

What We Deliver

  • HPE Private Cloud — dedicated environments (on-prem or hosted)
  • Hybrid Cloud — secure integration of on-prem Infrastructure with HPE GreenLake, AWS/Azure
  • Managed Public Cloud — hardened operations, monitoring, backups
  • Migrations — planning, execution, and post-cutover stabilization

Pricing

Managed Public Cloud

Secure management for AWS/Azure workloads.

From $750/mo + usage

  • Baseline security hardening
  • Monitoring & alerting
  • Backups + retention policy
  • Monthly optimization report

HPE Private Cloud

Dedicated private cloud with lifecycle management.

From $2,500/mo

  • HPE infrastructure architecture
  • Virtualization setup
  • Patch + maintenance plan
  • Backup + recovery strategy

Hybrid Cloud

Best of both worlds for compliance + scale.

From $4,500/mo

  • Secure connectivity
  • Unified monitoring
  • Hybrid backup/DR
  • Identity & access controls

Final pricing depends on scope, users, locations, and compliance requirements.

Request a Cloud Assessment

Industry Solutions

Cloud and infrastructure designs tailored to your compliance and operational needs.

Healthcare IT

HIPAA-aligned cloud architecture, security controls, backups, and continuity planning.

View Healthcare IT

Accounting & Financial IT

Secure collaboration, predictable performance, and business continuity for client data.

View Accounting IT

Manufacturing & Industrial IT

Reliable infrastructure, hybrid cloud for ERP/production systems, and continuity planning.

View Manufacturing IT

Frequently Asked Questions — Cloud IT Services

What cloud IT services does IT Legends LLC offer?

IT Legends LLC is a cloud managed services provider delivering Microsoft Azure architecture, hybrid cloud infrastructure, cloud backup, and HPE edge computing solutions for Illinois businesses. Our cloud IT services are designed to improve performance, resilience, and security for small and mid-size organizations.

What is the difference between cloud and hybrid cloud?

Pure cloud runs entirely on provider infrastructure like Microsoft Azure. Hybrid cloud combines on-premises systems with cloud services — giving businesses more control, compliance flexibility, and cost efficiency. IT Legends LLC designs right-sized hybrid solutions for Illinois businesses.

security-compliance.body:
Security & Compliance

Reduce risk, improve security posture, and build compliance-ready operations.

Services

  • vCISO Advisory — quarterly strategy, risk reviews, roadmaps
  • Compliance Readiness — HIPAA-aligned policies and controls
  • Identity & Endpoint Protection — hardening and monitoring
  • Security Assessments — findings with prioritized remediation plan

Pricing

vCISO Lite

Executive security oversight for SMBs.

From $750/mo

  • Quarterly risk review
  • Policy guidance
  • Security roadmap
  • Monthly security summary

Compliance Readiness

Documentation + baseline controls alignment.

From $1,500 setup

  • HIPAA-aligned control mapping
  • Policy & procedure templates
  • Access control review
  • Remediation checklist

Final pricing depends on scope, users, locations, and compliance requirements.

Book Consultation

Industry Solutions

Healthcare IT

HIPAA-aligned Infrastructure, security, backups, and support.

Accounting & Financial IT

Secure collaboration, continuity, and streamlined IT operations.

Manufacturing, Logistics & Industrial IT

Secure reliable infrastructure, Device Lifecycle, and continuity planning.

Frequently Asked Questions — Cybersecurity for Small Business

What cybersecurity services for small business does IT Legends offer?

IT Legends LLC provides managed cybersecurity services including endpoint protection, ransomware defense, email security, identity management, and compliance monitoring. As a cybersecurity company for small business in Illinois, we offer affordable cybersecurity services that deliver enterprise-level protection without the enterprise price tag.

What is cybersecurity consulting for small business?

Cybersecurity consulting for small business means working with IT Legends LLC to assess your risks, build a security roadmap, and implement business cybersecurity solutions tailored to your industry. We cover everything from IT security fundamentals to advanced threat detection and compliance frameworks.

backup-disaster-recovery.body:
Backup & Disaster Recovery

Business continuity and rapid recovery—designed for ransomware resilience.

Services

  • Encrypted backups and retention policies
  • Ransomware-aware backup strategy (immutability where supported)
  • Disaster recovery planning and runbooks
  • Recovery testing (tabletop + functional where feasible)

Pricing

Backup Essentials

Reliable backups with monitoring.

From $100/workload

  • Backup scheduling
  • Alerting & reporting
  • Retention policy
  • Recovery guidance

DR Planning

Design and documentation for recovery objectives.

Custom pricing

  • RTO/RPO targets
  • DR architecture plan
  • Runbook documentation
  • Testing plan

Final pricing depends on scope, users, locations, and compliance requirements.

Book Consultation

Industry Solutions

Healthcare IT

HIPAA-aligned Infrastructure, security, backups, and support.

Accounting & Financial IT

Secure collaboration, continuity, and streamlined IT operations.

Manufacturing, Logistics & Industrial IT

Secure reliable infrastructure, Device Lifecycle, and continuity planning.

Frequently Asked Questions — Backup & Disaster Recovery

What managed backup services does IT Legends LLC offer?

IT Legends LLC provides managed backup services including Microsoft 365 backup, local server backup, and business cloud backup solutions for Illinois businesses. We monitor your backups daily, test restores regularly, and ensure your data is protected against ransomware, hardware failure, and accidental deletion.

Why does my business need cloud backup solutions?

Microsoft and other cloud providers do not automatically back up your data. Business cloud backup solutions from IT Legends LLC ensure your critical files, emails, and databases are protected and recoverable — giving you confidence that a single incident cannot permanently destroy your business data.

it-strategy-advisory.body:
IT Strategy & Advisory

Clarity, planning, and budgeting—so IT supports growth, not chaos.

Services

  • 12–36 month IT roadmap and project sequencing
  • Budget planning (CapEx vs OpEx)
  • Vendor, licensing, and contract optimization
  • Executive IT reporting (quarterly reviews)

Pricing

Roadmap Package

A practical plan you can execute immediately.

$1,500–$5,000

  • Discovery workshop
  • Current-state assessment
  • Roadmap + budget outline
  • Priority project list

Final pricing depends on scope, users, locations, and compliance requirements.

Book Consultation

Industry Solutions

Healthcare IT

HIPAA-aligned Infrastructure, security, backups, and support.

Accounting & Financial IT

Secure collaboration, continuity, and streamlined IT operations.

Manufacturing, Logistics & Industrial IT

Secure reliable infrastructure, Device Lifecycle, and continuity planning.

Frequently Asked Questions — IT Consulting & Advisory

What IT consulting services does IT Legends LLC provide?

IT Legends LLC offers strategic IT consulting services for Illinois small businesses including technology roadmaps, IT budget planning, vendor evaluation, and virtual CIO services. Our advisors align your technology investments with your business goals — helping you spend smarter and grow faster.

What are virtual CIO services?

Virtual CIO (vCIO) services provide your business with executive-level IT leadership without the cost of a full-time CIO. IT Legends LLC's vCIO service includes quarterly strategy sessions, technology planning, risk assessments, and board-level IT reporting for growing Illinois businesses.
